resources.string: After the selected time in the background, Sheepfold asks for the password, PIN, or system biometric check again.
Safe mode: open the app, unlock it, and confirm the shutdown.
Advanced mode: disable internet immediately from the home screen without unlocking.
Anyone with access to the unlocked phone home screen will be able to disable the family internet. Enabling internet remains a quick emergency action in either mode.
Too many incorrect attempts. Try again in %1$d seconds.
The command will be sent directly to the home OpenWrt router. Devices covered by allowed exceptions continue to follow their configured rules.
Could not disable internet on the router.
